articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Are All Smiles at NFL Event After Weekend Apart - TMZ
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were all smiles Monday night at an NFL event after the lovebirds spent the weekend apart engaged in what appeared to be pre-wedding activities.
